A small [[City/Legends|city]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]], '''Nayli''' was known as being one of the three main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]] on-planet.

==Description==
Nayli was located in Chandrila's equatorial belt on the planet's [[Chandrila's eastern continent|eastern continent]].<ref name="Strongholds" /> The city was surrounded by countryside and supported a large [[Hovertrain/Legends|hovertrain]] station. The buildings were mainly conical.<ref name="RS">[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']]</ref>

==History==
One [[Standard year/Legends|year]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the city was the site of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kohl Seerdon]]'s [[Blockade on Chandrila|battle]] with [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]], after Seerdon imposed a [[Blockade/Legends|blockade]] upon [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]]. Seerdon's forces attacked the city, but the Rogues brought supplies and repulsed Seerdon's [[TIE series/Legends|TIEs]] and [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]], allowing citizens to be evacuated on [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]].<ref name="RS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nayli appears in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']],<ref name="RS" /> although it went unnamed until the [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''.<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>
